name: Layered Southwestern Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces dark red kidney beans, drained and washed
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the elbow macaroni according to package directions.
2. Drain and rinse the cooked pasta under cold water; drain again.
3. Toss the pasta with oil, cumin, and salt.
4. Layer the macaroni, beans, corn, bell peppers, and onions in a 9 x 13-inch pan.
5. In a mixing bowl, combine mayonnaise, sour cream, and taco sauce.
6. Spread the mixture evenly over the top of the pasta, sealing to the edge of the pan.
7. Cover tightly and chill overnight.
